title: elaeocarpus robustus
intro: Elaeocarpus robustus, also known as the Blue Marble tree or Blue Fig, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions such as fever, skin infections, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus robustus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and fruits can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
